title: Taper Candles Long Burning - Long Candles Pack of 10 Tall Dinner Candles 7 Hour Burn Time, Classic Household Unscented, Dripless Candles, Zan Village Candle Company - Wine Red
features: Variety of Colours - We offer these multipack candles in the following colours, ivory, gold, silver, black, red, green and white candles. Our colourful candles add sophistication to every event.
Standard Size - These are 2cm diameter candles that will fit in most candle sticks, from the basic plain ones found around the house, to every fancy candlestick set on the most elegant table.
Colour Throughout - Every dinner candle in this candle multipack is made with solid colour throughout. When you light each wax candle, you'll find one solid colour the entire way through.
Non Drip Candles - Our tall candles are uniquely crafted to ensure that they are dripless. Make sure that the candle is fully upright, and not exposed to wind or a fan so they don't drip.

Unscented Candles Long Burning - We strive for quality and customer satisfaction. If this product doesn't meet your expectations, please write to us, so that we can resolve the matter for you quickly.
description: Product Description Smokeless Wicks Our tapered dinner candles use a high-quality cotton wick that burns cleanly without creating smoke, so you can relax and enjoy the soft glow. Dripless, Mess-Free These candles are dripless, so under normal circumstances, they won't leave a mess when they finish burning. External factors, such as lighting several candles in close proximity, or windy conditions can cause them to drip. 7 Hour Burn Time Meticulously made using top-quality wax these slow-burning candles will burn for up to seven hours, which should be enough to last the full extent of your event. Several Colour Options Choose from a variety of colours to match the colour scheme of your dinner. We currently offer our dinner candles in eight popular colours.
